title: Asukas role in 30 and Beyond tangent
display_title: Asukas role in 30 and Beyond tangent
wikitext:
[]: Post by Chrad » Wed Nov 28, 2012 11:26 am LinNervling04 wrote: And they won't have them together. The way things are going, we all know Shinji will probably get Rei back from Unit-01 at the last second in 4.0.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Nov 28, 2012 11:31 am Chrad wrote: Last minute Shinji/Rei romantic ending? You Can Redo!

[]: Post by Chrad » Wed Nov 28, 2012 11:32 am Huddle up in a ball and cry hysterically like a good little Shinji.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Nov 28, 2012 11:33 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Well, if You Can Not Redo and You Can Not Advance, then I wonder what the f#*k Shinji is supposed to do.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Nov 28, 2012 11:34 am Chrad wrote: Huddle up in a ball and cry hysterically like a good little Shinji.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Nov 28, 2012 11:42 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: @Xard: so You Can Repeat? Yeah, this could be a possible outcome.

[]: Post by Shakabutt » Wed Nov 28, 2012 12:09 pm As weird as Asuka/Shinji would be in 4.0, i would be even more weirded out by Shinji/Rei. I don't watch a lot of anime (well evangelion is the first lol) but i got the impression that she found out she was a clone if his mama in 2.0 with the mailed chip/capsule thingy, he finds out the same from old man Fuyawhatshisname in 3.0. In the translation he freaks out when it dawns at him what his actions caused. I don't know guys lol, ah and there was that "you look motherly" part also . I honestly think the romance boat has sailed in rebuild between our leading guy and his women lol. Maybe vague references and actions thrown in there for fans to bicker about, aka the Asuka and Shinji dialogue when he wakes up : 00:26:54 Little sister? Don't you mean big sister? 00:26:58 Yes, his little sister. 00:27:00 L-little sister...? How? 00:27:05 14 years have passed since then. Stupid Shinji. -cue sad anghsty violin- 00:27:09 Huh? Ah, Asuka! 00:27:14 Thank god. You're safe, Asuka! -punch in the window- 00:27:20 I can't stand this. I've been holding this in. 00:27:35 What was that about... 00:27:36 Built up anger and grief. 00:27:40 What do you mean...? Ah, Asuka, your left eye... 00:27:44 None of your business.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Nov 28, 2012 12:15 pm Ahem, the funny thing about Shinji in 3.0 is that he doesn't seem to give a fuck about Rei being his mother's clone, after Fuyutsuki revealed it he was more concerned by the fact that there are other Ayanamis, than by their origin. I don't say that it really leaves open the door to an R/S ending but I found it quite interesting. @Xard: I agree, actually before putting the silly remark about Shinji dying, because I'm still a little depressed by this (expectable) turn of events, I wanted to say something about the possibility of repeating everything.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Nov 28, 2012 12:19 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Ahem, the funny thing about Shinji in 3.0 is that he doesn't seem to give a fuck about Rei being his mother's clone, after Fuyutsuki revealed it he was more concerned by the fact that there are other Ayanamis, than by their origin. I don't say that it really leaves open the door to an R/S ending but I found it quite interesting.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Nov 28, 2012 12:25 pm Azathoth wrote: He was already aware on some level that Rei was linked to his mother (viz his deep thoughts on Eva's smell) and clearly understood the subtext of 2.0's last scene even if most of his audience did not.

[]: Post by LinNervling04 » Wed Nov 28, 2012 1:31 pm Eh, the whole fruedian/oedipus rex arguement again... idk. She may be similar in flesh(though dulled down abit through use of Lilith) but still if she and Shinji are happy together, then so what? Rei is not Yui herself. She's still her own being, independent of Yui. Sadly she's forced by everyone to live in Yui's shadow. Which is why she's so similar. Ie. Gendo probably forces her to keep the same hair-do and he exposes her to elements of his life that only Yui knew of. For those of you who believe in the Bible's Adam and Eve, by that logic, we're all related genetically. And we're frightened by Rei and Shinji?

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Nov 28, 2012 1:43 pm The thought that people want Rei and Shinji to hop on a white horse and ride off to the horizon is unsettling to me simply because of how disturbingly their relationship is actually portrayed and how disturbingly he reacts to its loss. Incest taboo does not play into it so much as taboo against abusive relationships with no sense of reciprocal respect. or put another way, if you think Shinji and Rei would be "happy" together in the Hollywood sense then I do not think you've been reading Eva very well

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Nov 28, 2012 1:52 pm Fundamentally the concern with Rei thing even isn't that she's genetically clone of Yui - it's jut another way to drive home the point what Rei symbolically represents in NGE and embracing Rei is equal with embracing all the evil that comes with it. It's as literally a baddo endo as you can get with Eva. Rei being clone of Shinji's mother just is the ultimate stab in the heart of those who can't see she's this hueg motherly womb of comfort who'll end up swallowing him if he doesn't man up and face reality (this, incidentally, happens literally in EoE thanks to GNR) It has very little to do with Rei's character in itself - just like "Asuka End" (if one wants to infer that from OMF, it's possible but on purpose not certain) is good end because of what she represents, not because she calls the guy "baka-Shinji" or is part-gaijin. (Being redhead? Well that actually is relevant.) NME is not pushing the dualism even remotely as much but certainly enough to make it NG territory once again. To compensate on Asuka as alternative focus loss film series is building all these negative Shinji/Gendo parallels sure, if one views Rei as romanceable girl this is kinda tragic for her but then again she's marshmallow space goddess who could end humanity on whim after gaining her full power so...

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Nov 28, 2012 2:04 pm Xard wrote: just like "Asuka End" (if one wants to infer that from OMF, it's possible but on purpose not certain) is good end because of what she represents, not because she [...] is part-gaijin.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Nov 28, 2012 2:06 pm And I say "meh" to all this symbolism BS, I don't get why you have to search for the less compatible alternative, Asuka, to "man up" rather than try to work out things with someone who understands you better than yourself. By the end of 2.0 Shinji started looking at Rei as an object of dependence, I have to accept it after Q, but this is an issue that Shinji develops with everyone, everytime, didn't he use Asuka in a similar way in EoE?

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Nov 28, 2012 2:08 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: And I say "meh" to all this symbolism BS, I don't get why you have to search for the less compatible alternative, Asuka, to "man up" rather than try to work out things with someone who understands you better than yourself. By the end of 2.0 Shinji started looking at Rei as an object of dependence, I have to accept it after Q, but this is an issue that Shinji develops with everyone, everytime, didn't he use Asuka in a similar way in EoE?

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Nov 28, 2012 2:12 pm Azathoth wrote: He attempted to use Asuka as a comfort-object, for which reason she deliberately rejects him and tells him to go fuck himself. Rei, on the other hand, found it perfectly acceptable that Shinji wallow in self-pity inside her head-uterus for all eternity.

[]: Post by Darkwing » Wed Nov 28, 2012 2:15 pm I'm not sure an Asuka relationship is going to be all that healthy either. She initally has that superiority inferiority complex. She can't acknowledge that she is attracted to Shinji because of the fact some of the things she's attracted to are tied to things she dislikes. Screaming at someone and hitting them isn't romantic. It's domestic abuse.

[]: Post by Bagheera » Wed Nov 28, 2012 2:17 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: This is because Rei doesn't care that much about herself, unlike "I want you all for me" Asuka, I don't think that our red-head did it for the sake of Shinji, nor it says much about her being a better alternative.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Wed Nov 28, 2012 2:18 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: This is because Rei doesn't care that much about herself, unlike "I want you all for me" Asuka, I don't think that our red-head did it for the sake of Shinji, nor it says much about her being a better alternative.
